name: concrete/services-grid
title: Services Grid
description: Three-column feature grid with heading, subtitle and footer paragraph.

footerText.default: CONCRETE has partnered with 50+ clients across Asia, delivering projects with precision and creativity. From complex web systems and BPO to co-working spaces and startup support, we bring real expertise to every challenge.

default.title: Web System Development
default.text: We build and develop complex website systems and applications across diverse industries, and provide reliable BPO data entry services with the highest quality standards.

default.title: Co-working Space
default.text: Our flexible co-working spaces include all utilities and services, designed to meet the evolving requirements of teams, freelancers and growing startups.

default.title: Startup Support
default.text: We support entrepreneurship and startup ideas from concept to launch, providing technical expertise, workspace and strategic guidance for ambitious founders.
